ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neural_networks" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neural network model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the neural network model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neural network model */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the model was uploaded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the neural network model */,
  "dataset_used" TEXT /* Dataset used to train the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pruning_techniques" (
  "technique_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pruning technique */,
  "technique_name" TEXT /* Name of the pruning technique (e.g., ERK) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pruning technique */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the pruning technique */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technique_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer configuration */,
  "layer_name" TEXT /* Name of the layer configuration (e.g., features.0) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the layer configuration */,
  "layer_type" TEXT /* Type of the layer (e.g., convolutional, fully connected) */,
  "num_neurons" INTEGER /* Number of neurons in the layer */,
  "activation_function" TEXT /* Activation function used in the layer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimization_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neural network model */,
  "technique_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pruning technique used */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layer configuration used */,
  "optimized_metric" TEXT /* Name of the optimized metric */,
  "optimized_value" REAL /* Value of the optimized metric */,
  "optimization_algorithm" TEXT /* Optimization algorithm used */,
  "num_iterations" INTEGER /* Number of iterations used for optimization */,
  "computational_cost" REAL /* Computational cost of optimization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_results_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_results_technique_id FOREIGN KEY ("technique_id") REFERENCES pruning_techniques ("technique_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES neural_networks ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neural network model */,
  "technique_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pruning technique used */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layer configuration used */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Visualization data */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_technique_id FOREIGN KEY ("technique_id") REFERENCES pruning_techniques ("technique_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES neural_networks ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neural network model */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the model version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the model version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES neural_networks ("model_id")
)
